details.IncidentDetail: "[2] GUARDRAIL REPAIR MAZEEP AT I-10 E/B AT RED CLOUD TILL APPROXIMATELY 1430 HOURS, WILL ADVISE ON LANE CLOSURES"

"[1] GARLOCK RD - CLOSED FROM REDROCK RANDSBURG RD TO US395 DUE TO STORM DAMAGE"
"[23] 73-S5 FOLLOWING 1185 OFF MAIN ST TO COMPLETE 180 "
"[11] 73-S5 1182 CONT TO ROLL THEM COP / 1039 CAL FIRE"
"[8] 73-S5 BELIEVE SAW VEH TURNING AROUND AT MINNEOLA"
